title: Initializers should not return a value
description: Prevent initializers from returning a value as it can lead to unexpected behavior.
message: Initializer should not return a value.
recommendation: Remove the return statement in the initializer.

compliant.description: Initializer does not return a value.

why_is_this_an_issue: Returning a value from an initializer can lead to unexpected behavior.
how_to_fix: Remove the return statement in the initializer.
function_code:
def check_init_should_not_return_a_value(node):
    return isinstance(node, dict) and node.get('node_type') in ['FunctionDef', 'AsyncFunctionDef'] and node.get('name') == '__init__' and 'return' in node.get('body', [])

metadata.title: Initializers should not return a value
